creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

I have committed a fix by get it uses system's sed instead of japanese/sed. I 
think that you will have to ditch the japanese/sed. If FreeBSD base system sed 
and port's gsed work fine, but not japanese/sed. It means that japanese/sed is 
broke and recommend to not install it.
